loveLetter.title: LoveLetter
loveLetter.description: A highly personalized romantic love letter created for Valentine's Day

id.description: Unique ID for the love letter

receiverName.description: The name of the partner receiving the letter

enhancedMessage.description: The AI-polished cute and sweet romantic message

musicLink.description: Platform link of the song (e.g., YouTube/Spotify URL)

theme.description: The selected visual theme for the letter

anniversaryDate.description: The anniversary or starting date of the relationship

photos.description: List of compressed base64 images of the couple

loveCoupons.description: List of cute interactive love coupons for the partner to redeem

createdAt.description: The date and time this letter was created

/letters/{letterId}.description: Store all public and shareable Valentine love letters
